summary_one_line: Input must carry a valid ICC color-space signature at offsets 0x10-0x16 so _cmsICCcolorSpace returns nonzero, taking the false branch.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A valid ICC color-space FOURCC signature in the InputFormat/OutputFormat header fields (offsets 0x10-0x16: e.g. 'Lab '/'Lab ' rather than 'RGB '/'XYZ ') such that _cmsICCcolorSpace((int)T_COLORSPACE(*InputFormat)) maps to a recognized cmsColorSpaceSignature != 0, so the line-668 check (ColorSpace == 0 || OutputColorSpace == 0) is FALSE and execution continues into resampling.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry the exact color-space token bytes the equality CMPs in _cmsICCcolorSpace expect; cmplog/vpc logged the constant operand of each color-space comparison and I2SRandReplace substituted it into the header offsets, producing seeds whose ColorSpace lookup succeeds (avg hitcount on the false side 53/71, resolved 10/10).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds carry header bytes ('RGB '/'XYZ ' at 0x10-0x16) that, in this trial population, drive the lookup to a value that fails the line-668 guard so they take the TRUE side and return FALSE early; naive/value_profile have no I2S substitution to plant the matching color-space FOURCC and stay blocked 10/10 for 24h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog and value_profile_cmplog both add I2SRandReplace, which reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer, finds the color-space comparison operands, and splices the matching FOURCC into the input header. naive and plain value_profile lack I2SRandReplace, so they cannot place the exact color-space token by directed substitution. This is the I2S roadblock-solving mechanism, matching claimed_mechanism I2SRandReplace.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocking branch is the color-space-must-be-specified guard at cmsopt.c:668 in OptimizeByResampling, with the false side globally blocked.
ColorSpace is computed from the input format color-space field via _cmsICCcolorSpace, so the input bytes feeding T_COLORSPACE determine whether the guard passes.
Winner and loser seeds differ deterministically in the color-space token bytes at offsets 0x10-0x16 (W='Lab','Lab', L='RGB','XYZ').
A winner-resolving seed was discovered by cmplog and carries the 'Lab Lab' color-space tag at the header offsets.
A loser-blocking seed carries the 'RGB XYZ' color-space tag and stays on the blocked side.
cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which substitutes a logged CMP operand at offsets where the other operand matches in the input.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: Plain value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, so the I2S substitution is exclusive to the cmplog/vpc winners.
Both decisive pairs are I2S deltas with the winner resolving 10/10 and the loser blocked 10/10.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2220 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 0aedfccd0898c3ff` and `--fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 143a446d794db4ae`. Both chains contain exactly one I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 16, sharing the same ancestor 5441efb6193a1a03 — direct lower-bound evidence of an I2SRandReplace find in both winners' lineage.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on an exact color-space FOURCC equality at a fixed input offset where cmplog/vpc do NOT resolve faster than naive/value_profile (no I2S advantage), which would show the gate is not solved by input-to-state substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact mapping from the 0x10-0x16 token bytes through T_COLORSPACE to a nonzero cmsColorSpaceSignature is inferred from source plus byte-diff correlation, not from a traced operand value at the line-668 comparison.
